meaning: n.推弹杆,严厉的负责人adj.严厉的,生硬的
examples: I don't have the ramrod posture I had when I was in the navy.
The soldiers stood at ramrod attention.
With a ramrod-straight back and hands neatly clasped in her lap, we gradually broke into conversation.
If your pie is green, or stands ramrod straight when cut, then just push it back.
